name: dotfiles-claude-plugins
description: Curated Claude Code plugins from official marketplace for dotfiles setup

pyright-lsp.description: Python code intelligence via Pyright LSP. Provides type checking, go-to-definition, find references, and auto-diagnostics for Python projects.

typescript-lsp.description: TypeScript/JavaScript code intelligence. Real-time diagnostics, navigation, and type information for TS/JS projects.

rust-analyzer-lsp.description: Rust code intelligence via rust-analyzer. Provides diagnostics, completion, and navigation for Rust projects.

gopls-lsp.description: Go code intelligence via gopls. Type checking, navigation, and diagnostics for Go projects.

commit-commands.description: Git commit workflows including commit, push, and PR creation. Streamlines git operations with guided commands.

pr-review-toolkit.description: Specialized agents for reviewing pull requests. Code quality analysis, security checks, and best practice validation.

plugin-dev.description: Toolkit for creating your own Claude Code plugins. Includes templates, validation, and testing utilities.

github.description: GitHub integration. Manage issues, PRs, repositories, and workflows directly from Claude Code.

gitlab.description: GitLab integration. Manage merge requests, issues, pipelines, and repositories from Claude Code.

atlassian.description: Atlassian integration for Jira and Confluence. Manage issues, sprints, and documentation.

linear.description: Linear issue tracking integration. Create, update, and manage issues from Claude Code.

notion.description: Notion workspace integration. Access and manage pages, databases, and documentation.

figma.description: Figma design integration. Access designs, components, and export assets from Claude Code.

slack.description: Slack workspace integration. Send messages, manage channels, and integrate workflows.

vercel.description: Vercel deployment platform integration. Manage deployments, check build status, and configure domains.

firebase.description: Firebase integration. Manage Firestore, Authentication, Functions, and Hosting from Claude Code.

sentry.description: Sentry error monitoring integration. Query errors, manage issues, and analyze stack traces.

chrome-devtools-mcp.description: Control and inspect a live Chrome browser. Record performance traces, analyze network requests, automate browser actions.

explanatory-output-style.description: Educational output style with insights about implementation choices and best practices.

learning-output-style.description: Interactive learning mode for skill building with step-by-step explanations.

context7.description: Upstash Context7 MCP server for up-to-date documentation lookup. Pull version-specific documentation and code examples directly from source repositories.

playwright.description: Browser automation and end-to-end testing MCP server by Microsoft. Enables Claude to interact with web pages, take screenshots, fill forms, click elements, and perform automated browser testing workflows.

ruby-lsp.description: Ruby language server for code intelligence and analysis

security-guidance.description: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files, including command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns

postman.description: Full API lifecycle management for Claude Code. Sync collections, generate client code, discover APIs, run tests, create mocks, publish docs, and audit security. Powered by the Postman MCP Server.

claude-mem.description: 3-tier memory system (summaries/timeline/observations) with SQLite+ChromaDB. 46k stars! Automatically captures everything Claude does during coding sessions, compresses with AI, and injects relevant context into future sessions. Web UI included.

memsearch.description: Lightweight memory plugin with Markdown storage and auto-injection into context. Cross-platform semantic memory for AI coding agents. Markdown-first, hybrid search (BM25 + Dense + RRF), progressive retrieval.

goodmem.description: GoodMem memory infrastructure for AI agents. Use Python SDK skills to write code that manages embedders, spaces, and memories, or use MCP tools to perform GoodMem operations directly via natural language.

remember.description: Continuous memory for Claude Code. Extracts, summarizes, and compresses conversations into tiered daily logs. Claude remembers what you did yesterday.

claude-supermemory.description: Cloud-based memory service. Gives your AI persistent memory across sessions using Supermemory. Your agent remembers what you worked on — across sessions, across projects.

sensitive-canary.description: Zero-config secret detection. Detects 29 secret types, blocks .env files by filename, fully local. No external servers. No configuration. No API keys. Prevents secrets and PII from reaching the API.

figma.description: Figma design platform integration. Access design files, extract component information, read design tokens, and translate designs into code.

mongodb.description: Official Claude plugin for MongoDB (MCP Server + Skills). Connect to databases, explore data, manage collections, optimize queries, generate reliable code, implement best practices.

greptile.description: AI-powered codebase search and understanding. Query your repositories using natural language to find relevant code, understand dependencies, and get contextual answers about your codebase architecture.
